task_name: Pick up the candle next to the bathtub and place it on the countertop to keep water from splashing onto it
instruction: I'm about to start my bath—please pick up the candle next to the bathtub and place it on the countertop to keep water from splashing onto it.
target_description: I'm about to start my bath—please pick up the candle next to the bathtub and place it on the countertop to keep water from splashing onto it.
